name: legax
description: Relay agent messages, phone replies, and agent-mediated approval requests through self-hosted or third-party transports.

interface.shortDescription: Bridge agent sessions to a phone.
interface.longDescription: Legax is a local-first Codex plugin and MCP bridge for relaying agent messages, phone replies, and agent-mediated permission requests through a self-hosted web relay, Telegram Bot API, or configurable webhook transports. It keeps approval decisions inside the native agent security model while making unattended sessions easier to monitor and continue.
defaultPrompt: Link this agent session to my phone.
Ask my phone before running risky commands.
Poll my mobile replies and continue.
